titleStmt.title: SII 40.291: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 291. (A.R. No. B. 336 of 1933.) Śiripuram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up before the temple of Rāmaliṅgēśvara.
This is dated Śaka 1093 (Rāma-nidhi-vyōma-rāja), Khara Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mūlasthāna-Mahādēva of Siripuram by Bolli-Nāyaka, son of Eṟṟama-Nāyaka. The gift was entrusted to Amarabōya, son of Mrānibōya for supply of ghee to the temple. Further it records the gift of a garden and lands to the god Rāmēśvara by Mārkaṇḍēya-reḍḍi and Kāsani-reḍḍi of Siripuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1093 Agunēṁṭi Uttarā
yaṇa saṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna siripuramu śrī
mūlasthānamahādēvaraku bollināyakuṁḍu
tamataṁḍri yeṟṟamanāyakunaku gaṁḍusāniki dhamma
tthamugā nakhaṇḍadīpamunakuṁbeṭṭina goṟiyalu
55 vīniṁjēkoni mrāniyabōyani koḍku Ama
rabōyuṁḍu dana putrānupautrikamu nitya
māneṁḍu nēyi bōyaṁggalavāru .
dārakāmana kha 1 dōraprōle kha 1 . siripuramu sāsaniku
kaṭṭaraḍḍi kaṁḍḍiraḍḍi vīri koḍku mārkaṁḍēyaraḍḍi kāsaniraḍḍi śrī
rāmāsvara mahādēvaraku niccina tāṭitoṁṭa naḍa
cucununna divyasiripuramu brammanā
yakuṁḍu goḍirisvaradē
varaku mēraku darabōya
ḍu niccena cēnuna
dēvara brahmapurulu jakkana
bhaṭṭa kha 1 sōmanabhaṭla kha 1 kō
ṭatamagōṭi kautavanaṁbuna dalavatti
nannayaku kha 10 Acanamallu
rāmanidhivyōma rājavatsaramu va¨rtti
laṁgā kharavatsaramuna na Aṭṭi Ī giri
paścimaṁbulōṁbaṁḍre ṭṭaṁ ba¨rvvabona .
Digital edition of SII 40.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
